forbidden_scope: App UI, SDK/MCP full entrypoints, generated clients, or App integration
History list/search/filtering, database/ORM/migration tooling, multi-backend abstraction, hosted service storage, or result store
Browser/runtime executor, Harbor SDK/runtime calls, raw evidence retrieval, live sessions, or Harbor package imports
Harbor, Lode, App, or other repository changes
True-write behavior, write operation execution, write reconciliation, complex retry/recovery, or generic browser agent loops

integration_evidence.summary: Adds a dependency-free run summary projection and store-backed query helper over existing Run Record truth.
Adds GET /runs/:run_id and optional local Run Record store binding through WEBENVOY_RUN_RECORD_DIR.
Validates Core query projection and API route success, not_found, and invalid run id behavior.

suite_path_consumption.rationale: Narrow Core/API read path over existing Run Record truth without result/evidence detail retrieval, CLI smoke, App integration, storage backends, or write behavior.
suite_path_consumption.consumer_boundary: Review and PR Ready consume ADR 0003/0005/0006/0007/0008, the Core run-query helper, API Server route, self-check output, GH-106 carrier, local build/typecheck/test/lint output, PR metadata readback, and hosted checks.
suite_path_consumption.recheck_condition: Upgrade to broader suite artifacts when result/evidence query, golden fixtures, CLI/API smoke, write guardrails, generated clients, App UI, database storage, hosted service storage, real execution, or true-write behavior are added.

commands.note: Validated Run Record store, run summary projection, missing/invalid run query failures, result envelope, and task submission admission.
Validated health/readiness, GET /runs/:run_id success, run_not_found, and malformed run id query failures.
Validated existing schema fixtures and Run Record conformance with 3 Run Records.

remaining_risks: GH-106 intentionally does not add result/evidence detail query, golden fixtures, API/CLI smoke, or write-side guardrails; GH-107 through GH-110 own those surfaces.
